channel.title: UrbanKicks RSS Feed
channel.description: Latest news and drops from UrbanKicks

item.title: New Release: Night Pulse 90
item.description: Discover the retro chunky silhouette with a bold street style.

item.title: Limited Restock: Urban Street Runner
item.description: The lightest sneakers are back in stock for a limited time.

item.title: Special Offer: 20% Discount
item.description: Use the code SNEAKER20 this weekend for exclusive sales.
